ops.text: Phase 2 roster CONFIRMED from the installed-plugin cache (authoritative for what fires today): 7 packs / 6 repos — cc-context, cc-guides, cc-notes, cc-present (hooks/capt-hook.toml), getaway (root capt-hook.toml; 1.0.1+ also leaks its dev .claude/capt-hook.toml into the shipped artifact since plugin root = repo root — works today only because [pack]-less candidate #1 gets skipped; scrub in the getaway lane), cc-skills show@skills + codex@skills (hooks/capt-hook.toml). show@skills is enabled at USER scope and codex@skills project+user → both packs ALREADY fire fleet-wide via 10.x auto-discovery — the plan's "show currently-unconsumed" assumption was pin-centric and wrong; the Phase 3 show decision dissolves (move preserves behavior). NEW Phase 3 item: repo-bootstrap templates (cc-skills plugins/repo-bootstrap .../templates/{base,go,python,bun,swift}/claude/fragments/capt-hook.toml) seed capt-hook fragment layouts into every new repo — must be dropped or every bootstrap recreates dead config (task #10). Phase 1v review workflow in flight (wf_0fee1f2e-d8c: 3 codex finder lenses → per-finding refuters).
